channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Item dumped on street, 22nd March
item.description:
Flytipped furniture on street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Whiteley Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge and other flytpiing, 22nd March
item.description:
I reported this fly tipped fridge which has been here 2 months now. I was told to email Waste Operations directly, but they told me to report this via this website (so going in an endless loop). Dangerous as lots of children are now playing with this.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northfield Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food and household items on the pavement, 22nd March
item.description:
These are all items that could easily be put into normal recycling and rubbish collection. But they are attracting vermin and blocking the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stamford Hill, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags left on pavement, 22nd March
item.description:
7 bags of rubbish left on both corners of Brodia Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kynaston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes recurring, 22nd March
item.description:
Recurring potholes on Beckenham Grove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Grove, Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: Overgrown hedge, 22nd March
item.description:
67 Albion road n16 hedge is blocking half the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Albion Road, Hackney, London

item.description:

item.title: Litter on the corner, 22nd March
item.description:
There is a large amount of litter on the corner of the street in the gutter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): De Beauvoir Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose rocking sunken broken slabs, 22nd March
item.description:
In ramp from station and riverside to Compton Street. For three months at least. Southwark Council says it is a private company's responsibility. There are many trip hazards which make the appropriate organisation liable for injury claims. Sampson House Limited (incorporated in Jersey) OE ID: OE018947 c/o Native Land Ltd Jersey No response from them for two months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hopton Street, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 22nd March
item.description:
Outside no 213 Bromley Road. Remove graffiti from bus shelter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Large Pothole next to drain cover in middle of road, 22nd March
item.description:
Pothole developed in middle of road which is difficult to avoid when turning right out of Copers Cope Road. Big enough to cause a motorcyclist/cyclist to come off bike.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 22nd March
item.description:
Flytipping of furniture on pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Road, New Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Bus stop H Burnt Ash Road Lee Road towards Blackheath Or Lewisham : missing route 261 E plate on north facing flag, 22nd March
item.description:
Bus stop H Burnt Ash Road Lee Road towards Blackheath or Lewisham : missing route 261 E plate on north facing flag See photographs Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnt Ash Road, Blackheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden waste flytipped, attracting more rubbish, 22nd March
item.description:
Garden waste flytipped by estate residents (I know the address); pile is now attracting more waste from other flytippers.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blanchard Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain outside 134 Hayes Lane is loose and very noisy when vehicles drive over it, 22nd March
item.description:
Drain outside 134 Hayes Lane is loose and very noisy when vehicles drive over it. Disruptive to sleep etc

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 149, Hayes Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
